# Environment Variables & Configuration Reference

> AppManager ŌĆö Configuration variables extracted from `appsettings.json` files

## Configuration Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/AppManager.Web/appsettings.json` | Web application configuration |
| `src/AppManager.Web/appsettings.Development.json` | Development overrides (currently empty) |
| `src/AppManager.Web/appsettings.secrets.json` | Local developer secrets (gitignored) |
| `src/AppManager.DbMigrator/appsettings.json` | Database migrator configuration + OpenIddict seed |
| `src/AppManager.DbMigrator/appsettings.secrets.json` | Migrator local secrets (gitignored) |
| `test/AppManager.HttpApi.Client.ConsoleTestApp/appsettings.json` | Test API client configuration |
| `test/AppManager.HttpApi.Client.ConsoleTestApp/appsettings.secrets.json` | Test client secrets (gitignored) |

## Configuration Reference

### Web Application (`src/AppManager.Web/appsettings.json`)

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: env-table -->
| Key | Required | Description | Example | Default |
|-----|----------|-------------|---------|---------|
| `App:SelfUrl` | Yes | Base URL of the web application | `https://localhost:44303` | ŌĆö |
| `ConnectionStrings:Default` | Yes | SQL Server connection string | `Server=(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB;Database=AppManager;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True` | ŌĆö |
| `StringEncryption:DefaultPassPhrase` | Yes | Encryption passphrase for `IStringEncryptionService` | `4IOQ4mMLbqyvmifn` | ŌĆö |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: env-table -->

### Database Migrator (`src/AppManager.DbMigrator/appsettings.json`)

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: env-table -->
| Key | Required | Description | Example | Default |
|-----|----------|-------------|---------|---------|
| `ConnectionStrings:Default` | Yes | SQL Server connection string | `Server=(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB;Database=AppManager;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True` | ŌĆö |
| `OpenIddict:Applications:AppManager_Web:ClientId` | Yes | OIDC client ID for Web app | `AppManager_Web` | ŌĆö |
| `OpenIddict:Applications:AppManager_Web:ClientSecret` | Yes | OIDC client secret for Web app | `1q2w3e*` | ŌĆö |
| `OpenIddict:Applications:AppManager_Web:RootUrl` | Yes | Root URL for Web app (OIDC redirect base) | `https://localhost:44302` | ŌĆö |
| `OpenIddict:Applications:AppManager_Swagger:ClientId` | Yes | OIDC client ID for Swagger UI | `AppManager_Swagger` | ŌĆö |
| `OpenIddict:Applications:AppManager_Swagger:RootUrl` | Yes | Root URL for Swagger UI | `https://localhost:44305` | ŌĆö |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: env-table -->

### Test API Client (`test/AppManager.HttpApi.Client.ConsoleTestApp/appsettings.json`)

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: env-table -->
| Key | Required | Description | Example | Default |
|-----|----------|-------------|---------|---------|
| `RemoteServices:Default:BaseUrl` | Yes | Base URL of the remote API | `https://localhost:44303` | ŌĆö |
| `IdentityClients:Default:GrantType` | Yes | OAuth2 grant type | `password` | ŌĆö |
| `IdentityClients:Default:ClientId` | Yes | OAuth2 client ID | `AppManager_App` | ŌĆö |
| `IdentityClients:Default:UserName` | Yes | Test user login name | `admin` | ŌĆö |
| `IdentityClients:Default:UserPassword` | Yes | Test user password | `1q2w3E*` | ŌĆö |
| `IdentityClients:Default:Authority` | Yes | Authentication authority URL | `https://localhost:44303` | ŌĆö |
| `IdentityClients:Default:Scope` | Yes | OAuth2 scope | `AppManager` | ŌĆö |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: env-table -->

## Production Configuration

### SSO (Production Authentication)

When deploying to production, configure SSO via `appsettings.json` or environment variables:

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: env-table -->
| Key | Required | Description | Example |
|-----|----------|-------------|---------|
| `SSO:Authority` | Yes (prod) | OpenID Connect authority URL | `https://sso.example.com` |
| `SSO:ClientId` | Yes (prod) | OpenID Connect client ID | `AppManager` |
| `SSO:ClientSecret` | Yes (prod) | OpenID Connect client secret | `...` |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: env-table -->

### Certificate (Production OpenIddict)

In production, OpenIddict requires a signing certificate:

```bash
# Generate the certificate
dotnet dev-certs https -v -ep openiddict.pfx -p <your-password>
```

Place the `openiddict.pfx` file in the `src/AppManager.Web/` directory. The certificate password is configured in `AppManagerWebModule.cs`.

### Connection String for Production

```json
{
  "ConnectionStrings": {
    "Default": "Server=prod-server;Database=AppManager;User Id=app_user;Password=<secure-password>;TrustServerCertificate=True"
  }
}
```

Use environment variables, Azure Key Vault, or a configuration center instead of hardcoding credentials.

## Environment Variables Override

All `appsettings.json` values can be overridden via environment variables using the standard ASP.NET Core configuration hierarchy. Use colon separators or double underscores:

```bash
# Linux/macOS
export ConnectionStrings__Default="Server=prod;Database=AppManager;..."

# Windows PowerShell
$env:ConnectionStrings__Default = "Server=prod;Database=AppManager;..."

# Windows CMD
set ConnectionStrings__Default=Server=prod;Database=AppManager;...
```

## Security Notes

> ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ **Warning:** Multiple hardcoded credentials exist in the default `appsettings.json` files for development convenience. These MUST be replaced with environment variables, user secrets, or a secrets manager in production:

| Credential | Location | Value |
|------------|----------|-------|
| DB Connection (dev) | Web + DbMigrator | LocalDB with trusted connection |
| String Encryption PassPhrase | Web | `4IOQ4mMLbqyvmifn` |
| OIDC Client Secret | DbMigrator | `1q2w3e*` |
| Admin Password (seed) | Code | `1q2w3E*` |
| OpenIddict PFX Password | Web module | `2010d466-03bc-4fe6-8479-ca1ae045e6de` |
| Test API Password | ConsoleTestApp | `1q2w3E*` |

See [.claude/rules/ecc/csharp/security.md](../.claude/rules/ecc/csharp/security.md) for the project's security standards.
